'''Justa''' was a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Mutanda]]. Cold and rocky, it served as a shipping port for most of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy's]] [[prothium]]. The site of the only [[Justa starport|starport]] in the [[Killaniri system/Legends|Killaniri system]], it was [[Justa Imperial base|garrisoned]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]], supposedly to protect the interests of the [[BlasTech Industries/Legends|BlasTech Corporation]], [[Blethern Gas Industries]], and [[Czerka Arms/Legends|Czerka Arms]].
